title: IT Platform Responsible
company: If P&C Insurance AS Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: If P&C Insurance Latvijas filiāle Rīgā meklē IT Platform Responsible, kas vada Communication Composition un Distribution platformu — produktu īpašnieks, atbild par dokumentu sagatavošanas/izsūtīšanas sistēmu apdrošināšanas vajadzībām un platformas dzīves ciklu Azure vidē.
summary.en: If P&C Insurance's Latvia branch in Riga is hiring an IT Platform Responsible to own the Communication Composition and Distribution platform — acting as Product Owner, driving roadmap and operations of the document composition/distribution system on Azure for insurance use cases.
